title: Paperwork
description: Paper, planes, boxes, and staplers, everything paper-themed in one mod!
body:
Bring the world of **paper, cardboard, and office chaos** into Minecraft!
This mod adds a variety of **decorative** and **functional** items to help you build, automate, and have fun with everything related to **paper and offices**.

### ✨ Features

* 🛩 **Paperplane**: Throw a simple paper airplane just for fun!
* 🪂 **Big Paperplane**: A cheap, one-use paraglider. Launch it anytime, anywhere, and glide like a boss.
* 📦 **Cardboard Boxes**: Store blocks, mobs, or even disguise them as boring boxes… or wrap them up as shiny gift packages!
* 💌 **Letters**: Write messages and send them across the world with pigeons as your personal mail carriers.
* 🔫 **Stapler**: Forget office work—shoot staples at your friends instead!

…and many more paper-themed surprises!
